title: pelargonium × rapifolium
intro: Pelargonium × rapifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium or Ivy-leaved Geranium, is a perennial plant species in the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × rapifolium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a natural remedy for colds and flu.
